title: OpenUP work-product instance frontmatter (v1)
description: Typed traceability frontmatter carried by an authored work-product INSTANCE under a project's docs/ (vision, requirement, work-item, iteration-plan, use-case, test-case, decision). Distinct from template provenance frontmatter (type: Template, source_url, related.workproducts) which describes a template's KB origin and is NOT validated here. Injected by the openup-create-* skills, graded by a rubric, and validated by scripts/check-docs.py. The OpenUP-derived templates are never edited; frontmatter lands on instances only.

type.description: Work-product type. The only mandatory field. Names align to OpenUP KB work-product slugs (the v1 core spine).

id.description: Stable, project-unique identifier, e.g. "REQ-014", "VIS-001", "TC-031". Referenced by other instances' trace fields.

status.description: Lifecycle state of the work-product instance.

traces-from.description: Ids of the upstream work products this instance satisfies/refines (e.g. a requirement traces-from a vision). The authored, hand-written trace direction.

verified-by.description: Ids of the test-case instances that verify this work product (where the type warrants coverage). Authored on the verified work product, pointing at its tests.

traced-by.description: Derived inverse of traces-from: ids of downstream work products that trace from this one. Written by the index generator (T-037), NOT by hand.

owner-role.description: OpenUP role accountable for the work product, e.g. "analyst", "architect", "tester".

iteration.description: Iteration/phase the work product belongs to, e.g. "construction-2".
